identity.name: TheAgents.wtf
identity.tone: Editorial Premium, Anti-AI, Vogue meets SaaS
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Luxury. Stark Black, blinding White, Electric Green accent.

usage.h1: font-inter font-thin text-6xl md:text-8xl tracking-tighter uppercase leading-[0.8]
usage.h2: font-inter font-bold text-4xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight uppercase
usage.body: font-inter font-light text-base md:text-lg leading-relaxed text-gray-300
usage.label: font-inter font-bold text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-green-400

bento_grid.card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 p-8 flex flex-col justify-between hover:border-[#00FF88] transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF88] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 rounded-none
buttons.ghost: text-neutral-400 hover:text-[#00FF88] uppercase tracking-widest text-sm transition-colors

cards.agent: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#050505] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#00FF88]/50 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature: bg-transparent border-l border-white/20 pl-6 py-4 hover:border-[#00FF88] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 px-0 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00FF88] transition-colors rounded-none w-full font-light text-lg

chatbot.container: fixed bottom-8 right-8 w-96 h-[500px] bg-black border border-white/10 shadow-2xl z-50 flex flex-col
chatbot.header: p-4 border-b border-white/10 flex justify-between items-center bg-[#050505]
chatbot.message_ai: self-start max-w-[80%] bg-[#111111] text-[#00FF88] p-3 font-mono text-sm border-l-2 border-[#00FF88] mb-2
chatbot.message_user: self-end max-w-[80%] bg-white text-black p-3 font-sans text-sm mb-2

visual_enhancers.grain: before:content-[''] before:fixed before:inset-0 before:w-full before:h-full before:bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] before:opacity-[0.03] before:pointer-events-none before:z-50

instructions_to_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: The entire site must be black (#000000). No light mode toggle.
TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'Inter' for everything but play with extreme weights (Thin vs Black).
ACCENT: Use #00FF88 sparingly. Only for hover states, cursors, and key data points.
LAYOUT: The grid of agents is the centerpiece. Make it a 'Bento Grid' where some cards are tall, some wide.
INTERACTION: Agents should be black & white by default, and reveal the green accent or slight motion on hover.
CHATBOT: The 'Rock' demo must look like a terminal or a high-end concierge chat, not a generic support widget.
FORMS: No rounded corners. 0px border-radius. Thick bottom borders only.
NO GRADIENTS: Per instructions, avoid gradients. Use solid colors or noise textures.
MOBILE: Stack the bento grid into a scrollable list. Keep the 'Tu próximo equipo' text massive even on mobile.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) - but keep opacity high (90%) for this specific brand
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
